economic_notes: Enterprises include InnuConstruction (100%), L'Immobilière Montagnaise S.E.C. (99.99%), SDEUM (100%), NISHK S.E.C. (99.99%), Transport ferroviaire Tshiuetin inc. (33.3%), Tshiuetin S.E.C. (33.3%), Groupe Umek S.E.C. (23.3%), Les Pêcheries Nitshimau S.E.N.C. (50%), Pêcheries Uapan S.E.C. (99.99%), Société en commandite APUIAT (16.6%), 9321-1654 Quebec inc. (16.6%), 9392-8711 Quebec inc. (100%), Centre Culturel Innu de la Rivière Misha-Shipu Inc. (100%). Total equity participation value of $17,972,948.
notes: Combined financial statements (états financiers combinés) for fiscal year ended March 31, 2020. Government Business Enterprises accounted for by modified equity method. 13 affiliated enterprises with total equity value of $17,972,948. Net debt position of $19,007,780. Prior year adjustments of $514,806 recorded. ISC funding figure extracted from accounts receivable note (SAC receivable $5,663,530) rather than revenue schedule — actual ISC revenue transfer amount not separately disclosed in available text. Detailed revenue and expense schedules (Annexes 26-37) not fully available in extracted text, so revenue lines and expense breakdowns by program are incomplete. Restricted cash includes Housing Fund ($1,876,817) and Health Fund ($159,175). Long-term debt includes loans guaranteed by SAC, SCHL, SAA, and MSP across multiple financial institutions (Desjardins, BMO, RBC, SCHL). Chief Mike McKenzie and General Director Gilbert Dominique are signatories.
